_publications._publicationTitle: Optical dopamine monitoring with dLight1 reveals mesolimbic phenotypes in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Nf1+/- mice had greater peak responses to light (p<0.001) but not tone onset (p>0.99) compared to Nf1+/+ mice (n+/+ = 10, n+/- = 10)
details: Nf1+/- mice had greater peak responses to light (p<0.001) but not tone onset (p>0.99) compared to Nf1+/+ mice (n=10 each group)
